ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in pounds */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Fitness goal of the user (e.g., weight loss, endurance) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location or city */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* User's time zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., smartwatch, fitness tracker) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date the device was manufactured */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Last time the device was synced with the platform */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Current battery level of the device (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fitness_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the user at the time of recording */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken by the user */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled by the user in miles */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Number of calories burned by the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used to record the metric */,
  "gps_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates (latitude, longitude) where the metric was recorded */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., running, walking, cycling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fitness_metrics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fitness_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the analytics */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics entry */,
  "total_steps" INTEGER /* Total steps taken by the user on the date */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the user on the date */,
  "total_calories" REAL /* Total calories burned by the user on the date */,
  "avg_heart_rate" REAL /* Average heart rate for the date */,
  "resting_heart_rate" INTEGER /* Resting heart rate for the date */,
  "active_minutes" INTEGER /* Total active minutes on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., weight loss, endurance) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the goal */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  "progress" REAL /* Current progress towards the goal (percentage) */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the goal has been completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the goal was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workouts" (
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the workout */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the workout */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of workout (e.g., running, cycling) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the workout in minutes */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Number of calories burned during the workout */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the workout in miles */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the workout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workouts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep" (
  "sleep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the sleep */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sleep entry */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the sleep in minutes */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sleep (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "deep_sleep_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of deep sleep in minutes */,
  "light_sleep_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of light sleep in minutes */,
  "rem_sleep_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of REM sleep in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sleep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrition" (
  "nutrition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrition entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the nutrition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the nutrition entry */,
  "calories" REAL /* Total calories consumed */,
  "protein" REAL /* Total protein consumed */,
  "carbohydrates" REAL /* Total carbohydrates consumed */,
  "fat" REAL /* Total fat consumed */,
  "meal_type" TEXT /* Type of meal (e.g., breakfast, lunch, dinner) */,
  "water_intake" REAL /* Amount of water consumed in ounces */,
  "alcohol_intake" REAL /* Amount of alcohol consumed in ounces */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrition_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social connection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the connection */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accepted the connection */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., friend, trainer, family) */,
  "connection_date" TEXT /* Date the connection was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_friend_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accepted the challenge */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of challenge (e.g., step challenge, workout challenge) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the challenge */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the challenge */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the challenge */,
  "participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the challenge */,
  "current_progress" REAL /* Current progress towards the challenge (percentage) */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the challenge has been completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the badge */,
  "badge_type" TEXT /* Type of badge (e.g., step badge, workout badge) */,
  "earn_date" TEXT /* Date the badge was earned */,
  "badge_level" INTEGER /* Level of the badge (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is ranked */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user on the leaderboard */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the user on the leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_type" TEXT /* Type of leaderboard (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the leaderboard was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
